title: Feature relevance quantification in explainable AI: A causal problem
abstract_nl: We argue the confusion is based on not carefully distinguishing between observational and interventional conditional probabilities. Unconditional rather than conditional expectations provide the right notion of dropping features.
key_contributions: 区分 observational vs interventional conditional probabilities
Implementation Invariance 形式化:atr_i(x; f) = atr_i(x; f') if f=f'

process_meta.[AH-HA]: J19 是 SC 出生证明 —— 'v(S) 应该用 do-calculus 而不是 conditional expectation'
